behavior_summary: U8P_SILVORE::look is a minimal U8P_SILVORE::look/examine handler: when the player uses the game's 'U8P_SILVORE::look' (examine) action on this object/NPC it displays the short description text 'silver ore' and then terminates the U8P_SILVORE::look process.
There is no branching, menu logic, external calls, or flag reads/writes; the routine simply emits a single Bark/dialogue line and suspends/ends.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SILVORE::look issues a Bark containing the text 'silver ore' and immediately follows with a suspend/terminate of the process.
No conditional branches, loops, or other control-flow constructs are present in this script.
open_questions: Is this entity intended to represent a mineable silver ore deposit (inferred from the bark text and filename) or a decorative object labelled 'silver ore'?
Are there companion scripts (use/harvest handlers) elsewhere that implement mining interaction for this object, since no such behavior is present here?

main_function.name: U8P_SILVORE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines this object/NPC; specifically to show the text 'silver ore'.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player performs the 'U8P_SILVORE::look' (examine) action on this object/NPC
Typically triggered by player selection or proximity-based examine action (not explicitly represented in script)

function_map.name: U8P_SILVORE::look
function_map.role: Responds to the U8P_SILVORE::look/examine process by displaying a single short description ('silver ore') and ending the process.
